top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1991-10';

SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(substr(Patient.Birthday, 1, 4) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', Laboratory.Date) = '1991'
  AND strftime('%m', Laboratory.Date) = '10';

SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1991-10';

SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1991' AND strftime('%m', l.Date) = '10';

SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(substr(Patient.Birthday, 1, 4) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', Laboratory.Date) = '1991'
  AND strftime('%m', Laboratory.Date) = '10';

SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1991-10';

SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1991' AND strftime('%m', l.Date) = '10';

SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.Date >= '1991-10-01' AND l.Date <= '1991-10-31';

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(1999 - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS average_age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1991-10';
